TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Palinkaan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 543 buwan, 1,537 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 1,057 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palinkaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga Hupu. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga Katanka. tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ palinkaan ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК¦~КЁima ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, truku *%, ОІunun *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, s~Й•akizaja *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІs~Й•iluЕ‹. taj К”zil na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa Д§upu. taj mkjaД§uК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa katanka. taj К”llaw na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa paОІuis~Й•an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й•. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Palinkaan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 543 buwan, 1,537 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 480 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 1,057 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Truku 8%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, Tayan 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palinkaan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palinkaan hya' ga Hupu. tay mkyahu' na Palinkaan hya' ga Katanka. tay 'llaw na Palinkaan hya' ga Pabuisan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ palinkaan ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК¦~КЁima ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, truku *%, ОІunun *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, s~Й•akizaja *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІs~Й•iluЕ‹. taj К”zil na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa Д§upu. taj mkjaД§uК” na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa katanka. taj К”llaw na palinkaan Д§jaК” ЙЈa paОІuis~Й•an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й•. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
